issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect action type. Card text says 'trash 1 card from your hand' as part of activation cost, not an effect action. Should use ForceDiscard or similar, but activation costs should be represented differently in DSL structure.
PlayFromHand is incorrect. Card effect places a Character 'at the bottom of the owner's deck', not into play. Should be SearchDeck or similar deck-placement action, not PlayFromHand.
Missing condition that this is optional ('up to 1'). Filter should specify maxCost 2 is correct, but action must support optional/0-or-1 targeting.

Activation structure incomplete. Should represent 'trash 1 card from hand AND rest this Character' as activation costs, with the deck placement as the effect. Current structure conflates costs with effects.
